j4c_central._pending_routing: path-based on j4c.aurigraph.io — nginx grpc_pass /agent/ -> upstream gRPC (per ADM-075 + user direction 2026-05-02). Probed 2026-05-02: portal SPA serves /agent /grpc /agent/health 200 text/html (SPA fallback); /api/* reaches a JSON backend that 404s on AgentReportService — service not yet deployed. Once the J4C platform team ships the service, flip grpc_endpoint = _pending_endpoint and remove these comment fields.
j4c_central.comment: AurexV4 production. Currently doctor mode only (per-project Mandrill alerting); central data collection is the bridge per ADM-075 §5 until AgentReportService ships.
